name: dev-squad
description: Ship full-stack projects autonomously with 11 specialized AI agents (coordinator, architect, designer, backend, frontend, QA, security, auditor, devops, git-ops, writer). 9-phase PDCA pipeline includes anti-AI-slop UI design gate (Phase 3.5), 3-way code review (static + runtime + tooling), Phase 5 iteration loop with verification rollback, security pattern PreToolUse hook, and SaaS-class readiness (multi-tenancy, billing, compliance). Generated apps pre-seeded with .claude/ self-docs.
